pages.content:

[Home](https://docs.ahrefs.com/) [REST API](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/api/docs/introduction) [MCP](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/mcp/docs/introduction) [Data Studio](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/looker-studio/docs/introduction) [Bot Analytics](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/bot-analytics/docs/introduction) [Ahrefs Connect](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/ahrefs-connect/docs/introduction)

# Build with 
_Ahrefs data_

Access Ahrefs marketing and search data through our APIs and developer tools to build custom integrations and workflows.

Search documentation...⌘K

API Request

GET https://api.ahrefs.com/v3/site-explorer/refdomains ?target=ahrefs.com &mode=domain &limit=5 &order\_by=refdomains:desc

Response

200 OK

Domain / DRRef. Domains

1wikipedia.org98

2github.com96

3medium.com94

4stackoverflow.com93

5producthunt.com91

Output for illustration purposes.

[**REST API**\\ \\ Research keywords, analyze backlinks, track rankings, and monitor brand visibility across traditional search and AI platforms.](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/api/docs/introduction)

Browse all available API endpoints

Create and manage your API keys

Latest API updates and changes

[**MCP**\\ \\ Connect your Ahrefs data to AI assistants and agents to enhance their answers with real marketing insights.](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/mcp/docs/introduction)

[Introduction](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/mcp/docs/introduction)

What is MCP and how to get started

[Claude Desktop / Web](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/mcp/docs/claude-desktop-web)

Connect Ahrefs to Claude on desktop or web

[ChatGPT setup](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/mcp/docs/chatgpt-web)

Use Ahrefs data in ChatGPT conversations

[Claude Code](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/mcp/docs/claude-code)

Integrate Ahrefs into your coding workflow

[Introduction](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/mcp/docs/introduction)

What is MCP and how to get started

[Claude Desktop / Web](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/mcp/docs/claude-desktop-web)

Connect Ahrefs to Claude on desktop or web

[ChatGPT setup](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/mcp/docs/chatgpt-web)

Use Ahrefs data in ChatGPT conversations

[Claude Code](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/mcp/docs/claude-code)

Integrate Ahrefs into your coding workflow

[**Data Studio**\\ \\ Build custom dashboards with Ahrefs data in Google Data Studio.](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/looker-studio/docs/introduction)

[Introduction](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/looker-studio/docs/introduction)

Get started with Ahrefs connectors for Data Studio

[Site Explorer connector](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/looker-studio/docs/site-explorer-configuration)

Backlinks, organic traffic, and domain metrics

[Rank Tracker connector](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/looker-studio/docs/rank-tracker-configuration)

Track keyword rankings over time

[Site Audit connector](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/looker-studio/docs/site-audit-configuration)

Monitor site health and technical SEO issues

[Brand Radar connector](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/looker-studio/docs/brand-radar-configuration)

Track your brand presence in AI search

[Introduction](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/looker-studio/docs/introduction)

[**Bot Analytics**\\ \\ Understand how bots interact with your website. Track crawl activity, identify bot types, and monitor their impact.](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/bot-analytics/docs/introduction)

[Introduction](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/bot-analytics/docs/introduction)

Overview of Bot Analytics

[Cloudflare Logpush](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/bot-analytics/docs/cloudflare-logpush)

Recommended Cloudflare Enterprise setup

[Cloudflare Worker](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/bot-analytics/docs/cloudflare-worker)

Worker-based setup for any Cloudflare plan

[Cloudflare Worker](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/bot-analytics/docs/cloudflare-worker)

Worker-based setup for any Cloudflare plan

[**Ahrefs Connect**\\ \\ Bring Ahrefs data into third-party apps through our integration program. Built on API v3.](https://docs.ahrefs.com/en/ahrefs-connect/docs/introduction)
